children.text:
Alipay is the most widely used third-party online/mobile payment service provider in China. With over 100 million daily transactions and over 800 million monthly active users. Its primary product is a digital wallet, Alipay Wallet, which also includes a mobile app that allows customers to conduct transactions directly from their mobile devices.

Alipay is a must-have payment method for any business looking to reach a critical mass of Chinese shoppers both home and abroad. It's available in 70 markets and has already been adopted by over 3 million merchants worldwide.

excerpt: Digital wallet acceptance for Alipay via Adyen, supporting online and in-person payments where available.

content_features.title: Mobile-friendly wallet checkout
content_features.description: Designed for wallet-based payment flows that are commonly used on mobile devices and in-app browsers.

content_features.title: Authorization success and declines
content_features.description: Use complete order/customer data and ensure amounts and currency are correct to help reduce avoidable authorization declines.

content_features.title: Refund support
content_features.description: Operationally supports refunds (including partial refunds) according to Adyen’s payment method capability for Alipay.

content_features.title: Disputes and chargebacks
content_features.description: Chargebacks can occur; align customer communication and fulfillment evidence to respond efficiently when disputes are raised.

content_features.title: Coverage and currencies
content_features.description: Supports multiple processing and settlement currencies as provided by Adyen for this payment method.

content_features.title: Security and authentication
content_features.description: Wallet payments rely on issuer/wallet authentication mechanisms; implement the recommended flow in your Adyen integration for best results.

content_features.title: Online acceptance
content_features.description: AliPay supports ecommerce and other online payment flows.

content_features.title: In-person acceptance
content_features.description: AliPay supports in-person checkout and POS acceptance.

tip: If you see higher declines, double-check currency support and send complete shopper, billing, shipping, and order details before retrying the payment.

faq.question: Is this provider Alipay itself or Adyen?
faq.answer: This entry describes Alipay+ availability and details as offered via Adyen’s payment method integration; Adyen is the PSP providing access to the method.

faq.question: Can I accept Alipay+ online and in-store?
faq.answer: Adyen indicates support for both online and in-person channels, subject to your integration and regional availability.

faq.question: What currencies can I process and settle in?
faq.answer: Adyen lists supported processing and settlement currencies for this payment method; confirm the exact set in your Adyen account and documentation for your region.

faq.question: Why are some payments declined?
faq.answer: Declines can be caused by unsupported currency/amount rules, missing required shopper/order data, or wallet-side risk checks; validate your request fields and currency configuration.

faq.question: How do refunds work for Alipay+?
faq.answer: Refunds (including partial refunds) are supported per Adyen’s capabilities for this payment method; refund timing and user experience can vary by wallet flow.

faq.question: Are chargebacks possible with Alipay+?
faq.answer: Yes—Adyen indicates chargebacks are supported; ensure you retain fulfillment and customer communication evidence to respond to disputes.

seo.seo_description: Provider profile for Alipay+ via Adyen, including channels, currencies, availability, and operational considerations.
seo.keywords: Alipay+, Alipay, Adyen, digital wallet, ecommerce payments, POS payments
